title: Register with already-used email shows 'account exists' style error
description: Verifies registration fails with a clear visible error when the email is already registered.

steps.description: Type "COMMUNITYCODE123" into the community code field

title: Login with missing required community code shows validation error
description: Verifies the login form blocks submission when community code is required and missing, and shows a visible validation message.

title: Register form requires email (empty email submission shows validation error)
description: Verifies the register form shows a visible validation error when email is left blank.

steps.description: Type "COMMUNITYCODE123" into the community code field

title: Login form requires email (empty email submission shows validation error)
description: Verifies the login form shows a visible validation error when email is left blank.

title: Home dashboard loads with personalized welcome and key sections
description: Verifies the neighbor home dashboard renders the welcome message and the main content sections for notices, incidents, and quick actions.

title: Quick action: create a new incident from Home
description: Verifies the user can start creating an incident by using the 'Nueva incidencia' quick action from the Home dashboard.

title: Home shows latest notices list section (structure visible)
description: Verifies the 'Últimos avisos' section is present and shows a list area for recent items.

steps.description: Verify element "Últimos avisos" section is visible
Verify element "Incidencias recientes" section is visible

title: Home shows recent incidents list section (structure visible)
description: Verifies the 'Incidencias recientes' section is present and shows a list area for recent items.

steps.description: Verify element "Incidencias recientes" section is visible

title: Empty state: no notices present shows 'No hay avisos' message
description: Verifies that when there are no notices, the Home dashboard displays the specified empty-state card/message.

steps.description: Verify text "No hay avisos" is visible
Verify element "No hay avisos" card is visible

title: Floating button opens Secretario IA entry point from Home
description: Verifies the user can access the AI assistant entry point from the Home dashboard via the floating button.

title: Login guard prerequisite: Home dashboard accessible after successful login
description: Verifies that after a valid login, the user lands on Home and can see a stable dashboard header state.

title: Create a new incident with title and description and reach the incidents list
description: Verifies a neighbor can submit a new incident with required fields and then sees a confirmation and the incidents list.

steps.description: Click on "Incidents" in the main navigation
Type "Broken hallway light" into the incident title field
Type "The light on the 3rd floor hallway is flickering and sometimes goes off completely." into the incident description field

title: Create a new incident and verify the new item appears in the incidents list
description: Verifies that after submitting a new incident, the incidents list shows an entry matching the submitted title.

steps.description: Click on "Incidents" in the main navigation
Type "Water leak near mailbox" into the incident title field
Type "There is a small but constant leak on the ground floor near the mailbox area." into the incident description field
Verify text "Water leak near mailbox" is visible

title: Validation: submitting with blank title shows 'Title is required' and stays on new incident page
description: Verifies client/server validation prevents submission when the title is missing and shows the expected error.

steps.description: Click on "Incidents" in the main navigation
Type "The elevator makes a loud noise when starting and sometimes stops between floors." into the incident description field
Verify text "Title is required" is visible

title: Validation: submitting with blank description shows a required error and stays on new incident page
description: Verifies the description field is required and prevents submission when missing.

steps.description: Click on "Incidents" in the main navigation
Type "Garage door remote not working" into the incident title field

title: Cancel out of new incident form without submitting
description: Verifies the user can leave the new incident page using a cancel/back control without creating an incident.

steps.description: Click on "Incidents" in the main navigation
Type "Test incident draft" into the incident title field
Type "This is a draft that should not be submitted." into the incident description field

title: Form resilience: very long title/description are handled without breaking submission flow
description: Verifies the UI can handle long inputs and still completes submission and redirect successfully.

steps.description: Click on "Incidents" in the main navigation
Type "Noise complaint - repeated loud banging in the stairwell during late hours over multiple nights" into the incident title field

Type "Over the past two weeks, there has been repeated loud banging and shouting in the stairwell between 23:00 and 01:00. It seems to come from the 2nd to 4th floor landings. This is affecting sleep and could indicate misuse of common areas. Please investigate and remind residents about quiet hours." into the incident description field

title: View incidents list and filter by status 'Abierta' then open an incident detail
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can view the incidents list, filter by status, and open an incident detail page with key sections visible.

steps.description: Click on "Incidents" in the main navigation menu
Select "Abierta" from the status filter dropdown
Click on the first incident card in the list

title: Admin creates and publishes a notice with AI-generated full and short versions
description: Verifies an admin can draft a notice, request AI help, publish it, and see it listed under Notices.

steps.description: Click the "Admin" link or menu item
Click the "Nuevo aviso" button or link
Type "Corte de agua programado" into the title field
Type "Se informa que habrá un corte de agua por mantenimiento el próximo martes de 10:00 a 14:00." into the draft textarea
Click the "Pedir ayuda al Secretario IA" button
Verify element "Generated full notice body" is visible
Verify element "Generated short notice body" is visible
Click the "Comunicados" or "Notices" link or menu item
Verify text "Corte de agua programado" is visible

title: Neighbor views notices list and opens a notice detail
description: Verifies users can view active notices ordered by date and open a notice to see its details.

steps.description: Click the "Comunicados" or "Notices" link or menu item
Click the first notice in the list
Verify element "Notice detail card" is visible

title: Admin tries to publish a new notice with empty title and draft
description: Verifies required-field validation prevents publishing when title and draft are missing.

steps.description: Click the "Admin" link or menu item
Click the "Nuevo aviso" button or link
Verify text "Title and draft required" is visible

title: Admin requests AI help with missing draft content
description: Verifies the app blocks AI generation (or shows a visible error) when the draft is empty.

steps.description: Click the "Admin" link or menu item
Click the "Nuevo aviso" button or link
Type "Aviso sin borrador" into the title field
Click the "Pedir ayuda al Secretario IA" button

title: Admin publishes a notice without using AI assistance
description: Verifies an admin can publish using only manually entered content and see it on the notices page.

steps.description: Click the "Admin" link or menu item
Click the "Nuevo aviso" button or link
Type "Reunión de vecinos" into the title field
Type "Se convoca a reunión el viernes a las 19:00 en el salón social." into the draft textarea
Click the "Comunicados" or "Notices" link or menu item
Verify text "Reunión de vecinos" is visible

title: Notices list shows active notices view with expected ordering cue
description: Verifies the notices page presents active notices and provides a visible date context that supports ordering by date.

steps.description: Click the "Comunicados" or "Notices" link or menu item
Verify element "Notice date" is visible on at least one notice item

title: Create a reservation with optional notes and see confirmation
description: Verifies a logged-in neighbor can book an available time slot for a space and sees a confirmation message.

title: Reservation booking flow: select date/time, add notes, book, and confirm
description: Verifies the end-to-end booking interaction within a selected space: choose a free slot, optionally add notes, book, and see confirmation UI.

title: Weekly calendar shows both free and occupied slots for a space
description: Verifies that after selecting a space, the weekly calendar renders and indicates availability states (free vs occupied).

title: Attempt to book an already taken slot shows conflict error and recovery option
description: Verifies booking a taken slot is blocked with a visible conflict error and prompts the user to choose another time.

steps.description: Click on a slot marked as taken/occupied

title: Conflict error copy: 'Slot already booked' is displayed after booking taken slot
description: Verifies the specific conflict error message is visible after attempting to book an occupied slot.

steps.description: Click on a slot marked as taken/occupied
Verify text "Slot already booked" is visible

title: Recover from conflict by selecting another time after error
description: Verifies that after a conflict error, the user can select a different slot and proceed toward booking again.

steps.description: Click on a slot marked as taken/occupied

title: Book without notes (notes field left empty) still succeeds
description: Verifies notes are optional by booking a free slot without entering notes and confirming success UI.

steps.description: Click on a slot marked as free/available

title: Booking confirmation includes a visible reminder/scheduling note
description: Verifies the post-booking confirmation view includes a visible reminder-related message (as a proxy for reminder scheduling).

steps.description: Click on a slot marked as free/available

title: Chat: send a question and receive an assistant response
description: Verifies a logged-in user can ask a question in the AI chat and see a response message rendered in the conversation.

steps.description: Type "¿Cuándo se limpia el garaje?" into the chat message input
Verify text "¿Cuándo se limpia el garaje?" is visible in the chat conversation
Verify an assistant response message is visible in the chat conversation

title: Chat UI: sending an empty message is blocked
description: Verifies the chat does not send when the input is empty and no new user message appears in the conversation.

title: Chat: long question still sends and displays in conversation
description: Verifies the assistant accepts a long user message, renders it in the chat, and shows a response.

steps.description: Type "Necesito un resumen de las normas y también confirmar horarios de limpieza. Por favor incluye puntos clave y cualquier aviso reciente relevante para los vecinos. Este mensaje es intencionalmente largo para probar el comportamiento del cuadro de texto y el envío." into the chat message input
Verify text "Este mensaje es intencionalmente largo" is visible in the chat conversation
Verify an assistant response message is visible in the chat conversation

title: Summarize utility: summarize meeting minutes and show bulleted summary plus save option
description: Verifies the Summarize action returns a visible summary and presents an option to save the result.

steps.description: Type "Acta de reunión: 1) Se aprueba presupuesto para pintura de zonas comunes. 2) Se acuerda reforzar normas de uso del garaje. 3) Se programan tareas de limpieza para el primer sábado de cada mes. 4) Se revisará el contrato de mantenimiento del ascensor. 5) Se acuerda publicar un aviso con el calendario." into the text input area
Verify a summary result section is visible
Verify text "•" is visible in the summary result

title: Summarize utility: empty input is blocked
description: Verifies the Summarize action requires content and shows a visible validation message when the input is empty.

title: Navigation: assistant page loads and shows core chat controls
description: Verifies the assistant route renders and displays expected primary controls for chat and utilities.

steps.description: Verify element "chat message input" is visible

title: Admin incidents: filter open incidents and update status with internal note
description: Verifies an admin can filter to open incidents, update an incident status to 'En curso', add an internal note, save, and see the updated status in the incidents list.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" or "Panel de administración" in the main navigation

title: Admin incidents: apply filters to show only open incidents
description: Verifies the admin incidents panel filtering controls narrow results to open incidents (and optionally by community/category/priority) and the list reflects the selected filter state.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" or "Panel de administración" in the main navigation
Select "Abierta" or "Open" from the status/state filter dropdown

title: Admin incidents: open incident detail and save internal note only
description: Verifies an admin can open an incident detail panel, add an internal note, save, and see confirmation or the note visible afterwards without changing other fields.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" or "Panel de administración" in the main navigation
Click the first incident row in the incidents table

title: Admin incidents: update status to 'En curso' and verify list shows updated status
description: Verifies changing an incident status to 'En curso' persists after saving and is reflected in the incident list row status.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" or "Panel de administración" in the main navigation
Click the first incident row in the incidents table

title: Admin reservations: cancel a reservation via confirmation modal
description: Verifies an admin can cancel a reservation, confirm in the modal, and see the reservation marked as cancelled.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" or "Panel de administración" in the main navigation

title: Admin reservations: cancellation modal can be dismissed without changes
description: Verifies that starting a reservation cancellation shows a confirmation modal and that dismissing it does not change the reservation status.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" or "Panel de administración" in the main navigation
Click the first reservation row in the reservations table

title: Access control: attempting to change an incident outside your community shows forbidden error
description: Verifies the UI blocks status changes for incidents outside the admin's community and displays a visible 'Forbidden' or 'Access denied' error message.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" or "Panel de administración" in the main navigation
Use the community filter to select a different community than your own (if available)

title: Admin panel navigation: switch between incidents and reservations sections
description: Verifies the admin can navigate between 'Panel de incidencias' and 'Gestión de reservas' sections and each section shows the expected visible heading/content.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" or "Panel de administración" in the main navigation
Verify text "Panel de incidencias" is visible

title: Create a new community and verify generated community code and default plan
description: Verifies an admin can create a community from the Admin area and sees a generated community code and default/trial plan in the community list.

steps.description: Click the "Admin" option in the main navigation

title: Complete community creation form and confirm community appears in list
description: Verifies the community creation form accepts valid inputs and the newly created community is visible in the communities list.

steps.description: Click the "Admin" option in the main navigation

title: Enable Pro plan in Admin and confirm reservations become accessible
description: Verifies an admin can switch the community to Pro and then access Reservations without seeing plan-gating warnings.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" in the main navigation

title: Save Pro plan and see confirmation message
description: Verifies saving the Pro plan shows the expected success confirmation in the admin billing/plan area.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" in the main navigation

title: Confirm 'Pro features enabled' message after saving plan change
description: Verifies the UI shows 'Pro features enabled' after saving the plan switch to Pro.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" in the main navigation

title: Basic plan gating: attempting to reserve shows upgrade required notice
description: Verifies a neighbor in a Basic community sees a plan-gating message when attempting to create a reservation.

steps.description: Click on "Reservas" in the main navigation

title: Basic plan gating: verify upgrade notice text is visible after clicking Reservar
description: Verifies the exact plan-gating notice appears after a Basic user attempts to reserve.

steps.description: Click on "Reservas" in the main navigation
Verify text "Feature not available on your plan. Upgrade required." is visible

title: Basic plan gating: AI Assistant access is blocked or shows upgrade message
description: Verifies that in a Basic community the AI Assistant is not fully available and the user sees an upgrade-related message or blocking state.

steps.description: Click on "Asistente" in the main navigation
